name: Auto Torch
author: nabagaca
description: Automatically places torches in dark areas

showMessages.label: Show Messages
showMessages.description: Display chat notifications when using auto-torch.

showDebugMessages.label: Show Debug Messages
showDebugMessages.description: Show debug-only auto-torch messages such as placement failures.

brightnessLevelTrigger.label: Brightness Percentage Trigger
brightnessLevelTrigger.description: The brightness percentage below which torches are placed (0-100)

brightnessCheckCooldownTicks.label: Brightness Check Cooldown (Ticks)
brightnessCheckCooldownTicks.description: How often to check brightness. 60 ticks is about 1 second.

nearbyTorchPenaltyRadiusTiles.label: Nearby Torch Penalty Radius
nearbyTorchPenaltyRadiusTiles.description: Radius in tiles used to detect nearby torches when scoring placement.

nearbyTorchScorePenalty.label: Nearby Torch Penalty Strength
nearbyTorchScorePenalty.description: How strongly to avoid candidate spots near other torches.
